notes: Crypto Amihud illiquidity premium: long high-ILLIQ (illiquid) / short low-ILLIQ (liquid), top-30 USDT-M perps full-2022, weekly rebal, ASYMMETRIC taker cost (long/illiquid leg 20bp, short/liquid leg 5bp -- the make-or-break gate). IS-selected lookback=10d. OOS Sharpe=-1.73 ret=-33.0%/yr turn=0.0026/bar PSR=0.05 DSR=0.04 (vs SR*=0.007, 15 trials). Cost sensitivity: gross OOS Sharpe=-1.69, symmetric-5bp=-1.70, asym-20bp=-1.73. Beta-neutral to BTC (IS-fixed hedge beta=+0.02). CAVEATS: delta-neutral close-to-close maxDD=-31.4% is an ILLUSION (no intrabar liq/gap); the long leg is by construction the most expensive-to-trade basket so the asym cost is essential and slippage on illiquid perps may exceed even 20bp in size; dropped 0 symbols for short history (mild survivorship). Does NOT clear the cost/PSR gate -> the illiquidity premium is eaten by the real cost of trading illiquid coins (consistent with house priors).
